title: Filipino-Style Roast Chicken
description: A classic Filipino dish, this roast chicken is marinated in a mixture of citrusy and savory flavors, then roasted to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a blender or food processor, combine goeey soy sauce, orange juice, garlic, ginger, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Place the chicken in a large bowl and pour the marinade over it. Toss to coat the chicken evenly.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it in a roasting pan. Drizzle with coconut oil.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
